regex.name: makelist
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client, control import re from urllib.parse import urljoin if not control.infoLabel('Container.PluginName') == 'plugin.video.thecrew': return sport = 'fighting' base_url = client.request('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/posadka/xmls2/refs/heads/main/roxie_bases.xml') base = re.findall('"([^"]*)', base_url)[0] full_url = urljoin(base, sport) url = client.schedule(full_url) return url

regex.name: makelist2
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client import xbmc, xbmcgui, threading pDialog = xbmcgui.DialogProgress() pDialog.create('[B][COLOR orchid]THE CREW SPORTS[/COLOR][/B]', 'The Crew Is Loading Your Event Please Wait....') result = [None] done = [False] def fetch(): result[0] = client.external('[makelist.param1]') done[0] = True t = threading.Thread(target=fetch) t.start() progress = 0 while not done[0]: if pDialog.iscanceled(): pDialog.close() return if progress < 90: progress += 2 pDialog.update(progress, 'The Crew Is Finding Your Event...') xbmc.sleep(200) if not result[0]: pDialog.update(100, 'Stream not found.') xbmc.sleep(2000) pDialog.close() return pDialog.update(100, 'The Crew Is Playing Your Event!') xbmc.sleep(2000) pDialog.close() return result[0]

regex.name: makelist
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client,control if not control.infoLabel('Container.PluginName') == 'plugin.video.thecrew': return url = client.schedule('https://backend.streamcenter.live/api/Parties?pageNumber=1&pageSize=100&categoryId=20') return url

regex.name: makelist2
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client import xbmc, xbmcgui, threading pDialog = xbmcgui.DialogProgress() pDialog.create('[B][COLOR orchid]THE CREW SPORTS[/COLOR][/B]', 'The Crew Is Loading Your Event Please Wait....') result = [None] done = [False] def fetch(): result[0] = client.external('[makelist.param1]') done[0] = True t = threading.Thread(target=fetch) t.start() progress = 0 while not done[0]: if pDialog.iscanceled(): pDialog.close() return if progress < 90: progress += 2 pDialog.update(progress, 'The Crew Is Finding Your Event...') xbmc.sleep(200) if not result[0]: pDialog.update(100, 'Stream not found.') xbmc.sleep(2000) pDialog.close() return pDialog.update(100, 'The Crew Is Playing Your Event!') xbmc.sleep(2000) pDialog.close() return result[0]

regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client,control if not control.infoLabel('Container.PluginName') == 'plugin.video.thecrew': return url = client.schedule('https://sharkstreams.net/category/wwe') return url

regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client,control if not control.infoLabel('Container.PluginName') == 'plugin.video.thecrew': return url = client.schedule('https://buffstreams.plus/wwestreams') return url

regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client import xbmc, xbmcgui, threading pDialog = xbmcgui.DialogProgress() pDialog.create('[B][COLOR orchid]THE CREW SPORTS[/COLOR][/B]', 'The Crew Is Loading Your Event Please Wait....') result = [None] done = [False] def fetch(): result[0] = client.external('[makelist.param1]') done[0] = True t = threading.Thread(target=fetch) t.start() progress = 0 while not done[0]: if pDialog.iscanceled(): pDialog.close() return if progress < 90: progress += 2 pDialog.update(progress, 'The Crew Is Finding Your Event...') xbmc.sleep(200) if not result[0]: pDialog.update(100, 'Stream not found.') xbmc.sleep(2000) pDialog.close() return pDialog.update(100, 'The Crew Is Playing Your Event!') xbmc.sleep(2000) pDialog.close() return result[0]

regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client,control if not control.infoLabel('Container.PluginName') == 'plugin.video.thecrew': return url = client.schedule('https://methstreams.gs/league/wwestreams') return url

regex.name: makelist2
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client import xbmc, xbmcgui, threading pDialog = xbmcgui.DialogProgress() pDialog.create('[B][COLOR orchid]THE CREW SPORTS[/COLOR][/B]', 'The Crew Is Loading Your Event Please Wait....') result = [None] done = [False] def fetch(): result[0] = client.external('[makelist.param1]') done[0] = True t = threading.Thread(target=fetch) t.start() progress = 0 while not done[0]: if pDialog.iscanceled(): pDialog.close() return if progress < 90: progress += 2 pDialog.update(progress, 'The Crew Is Finding Your Event...') xbmc.sleep(200) if not result[0]: pDialog.update(100, 'Stream not found.') xbmc.sleep(2000) pDialog.close() return pDialog.update(100, 'The Crew Is Playing Your Event!') xbmc.sleep(2000) pDialog.close() return result[0]

regex.name: makelist
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client,control import re if not control.infoLabel('Container.PluginName') == 'plugin.video.thecrew': return r = re.findall('(?s)<a class="card" href="([^"]*).*?le">([^<]*)', page_data) return r

regex.name: makelist2
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client import xbmc, xbmcgui, threading pDialog = xbmcgui.DialogProgress() pDialog.create('[B][COLOR orchid]THE CREW SPORTS[/COLOR][/B]', 'The Crew Is Loading Your Event Please Wait....') result = [None] done = [False] def fetch(): result[0] = client.external('https://methstreams.ms[makelist.param1]') done[0] = True t = threading.Thread(target=fetch) t.start() progress = 0 while not done[0]: if pDialog.iscanceled(): pDialog.close() return if progress < 90: progress += 2 pDialog.update(progress, 'The Crew Is Finding Your Event...') xbmc.sleep(200) if not result[0]: pDialog.update(100, 'Stream not found.') xbmc.sleep(2000) pDialog.close() return pDialog.update(100, 'The Crew Is Playing Your Event!') xbmc.sleep(2000) pDialog.close() return result[0]

regex.name: makelist2
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client import xbmc, xbmcgui, threading pDialog = xbmcgui.DialogProgress() pDialog.create('[B][COLOR orchid]THE CREW SPORTS[/COLOR][/B]', 'The Crew Is Loading Your Event Please Wait....') result = [None] done = [False] def fetch(): result[0] = client.external('[makelist.param1]') done[0] = True t = threading.Thread(target=fetch) t.start() progress = 0 while not done[0]: if pDialog.iscanceled(): pDialog.close() return if progress < 90: progress += 2 pDialog.update(progress, 'The Crew Is Getting Your Event...') xbmc.sleep(200) pDialog.update(100, 'The Crew Is Playing Your Event!') xbmc.sleep(2000) pDialog.close() return result[0]

item.name: [COLOR orchid]¤[/COLOR] [B][COLOR white]WWE RAW[/COLOR] [COLOR orchid]DIRECT REPLAYS[/COLOR][/B] [COLOR orchid]¤[/COLOR]

regex.name: dir
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = 'https://thechains24.com/GREENHAT/WWE%20Monday%20Night%20Raw.xml'): from resources.lib.modules import control if not control.infoLabel('Container.PluginName') == 'plugin.video.thecrew': return from resources.lib.indexers import lists lists.indexer().get(url)

item.name: [COLOR orchid]¤[/COLOR] [B][COLOR white]ALL WRESTLING[/COLOR] [COLOR orchid]DIRECT REPLAYS DEBRID[/COLOR][/B] [COLOR orchid]¤[/COLOR]

regex.name: dir
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = 'https://thechains24.com/ABSOLUTION/NONE%20DEBRID/WWE/WWE%20FREE.txt'): from resources.lib.modules import control if not control.infoLabel('Container.PluginName') == 'plugin.video.thecrew': return from resources.lib.indexers import lists lists.indexer().get(url)
